LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION AND MONETARY SANCTIONS, OR ALTERNATIVELY FOR AN ORDER ISSUING MONETARY AND EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS - THE COURT REQUIRES PLAINTIFF FREDERICK LAMBANDRAKE TO APPEAR AT THE MEDICAL EXAMINATION ON MONDAY, APRIL 11, 2016. COUNSEL STIPULATE THAT A REPORT DOES NOT HAVE TO BE PREPARED. PLAINTIFF IS TO PAY THE $750 CANCELATION FEE WITHIN ONE WEEK. THE COURT GRANTS $3000 IN ATTORNEY FEES TO BE PAID TO MR. CROSBY. PAYMENT OF THE $3000 ATTORNEY FEES WILL BE STAYED PERMANENTLY IF PLAINTIFF APPEARS AT THE EXAMINATION ON MONDAY. IF PLAINTIFF DOES NOT APPEAR AT THE EXAMINATION, THE ATTORNEY FEES MUST BE PAID WITHIN ONE WEEK. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. Notice Of Motion And Defendant Costcos Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Independent Medical Examination And Monetary Sanctions, Or Alternatively For An Order Issuing Monetary And Evidentiary Sanctions ***Discovery Motion Set At 9:30 Per Court Order***
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION AND MONETARY SANCTIONS, OR ALTERNATIVELY FOR AN ORDER ISSUING MONETARY AND EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS

Appearances: Nikolaus W. Reed of NWR Law (415.940.7766) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; Thomas C. Crosby of Crosby & Rowell LLP (510.267.0300) for defendant and moving party.

Argued and the Court rules as follows: the Court requires plaintiff Frederick Lambandrake to appear at the medical examination on Monday, April 11, 2016. Counsel stipulate that a report does not have to be prepared. Plaintiff is to pay the $750 cancelation fee within one week. The Court grants $3000 in attorney fees to be paid to Mr. Crosby. Payment of the $3000 attorney fees will be stayed permanently if plaintiff appears at the examination on Monday. If plaintiff does not appear at the examination, the attorney fees must be paid within one week. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR 5976
